entries.failure_reason: grep -P not available on macOS — use grep -E or perl instead
entries.successful_alternative: Replace grep -P with grep -E throughout orphan-check.sh

entries.failure_reason: orphan-check scans entire merge diff, flags unrelated base-branch renames/integrations as false positives
entries.successful_alternative: Filter orphan-check to only feature-branch files from PRD.json files_affected, ignore base-only changes
